summary: P0 Fix Verified: Role Permission Matrix UI restored and fully functional. All 4 roles displayed (Administrator, Privileged User, Standard User, Operator). Permission Matrix shows collapsible modules with individual action checkboxes. Enable All/Disable All buttons work. Save persists changes to backend. Backend: 6/6 tests passed. Frontend: All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/iam/roles - Returns 4 roles (Administrator, Operator, Standard User, Privileged User)
Backend: GET /api/iam/roles/{id} - Returns role with permissions dict
Backend: PATCH /api/iam/roles/{id} - Update permissions works and persists
Backend: System role name protection - Cannot rename system roles (returns 400)
Backend: POST /api/iam/roles - Create custom role with permissions works
Backend: DELETE /api/iam/roles/{id} - Delete custom role works
Frontend: IAM page loads with Roles tab
Frontend: All 4 roles displayed with Key Permissions badges
Frontend: Edit button opens role dialog
Frontend: Permission Matrix section visible with shield icon
Frontend: Collapsible modules: Dashboard, Orders/Tickets, Users, Teams, Settings, Reports
Frontend: Individual action checkboxes (view, create, edit, delete, export, pick, assign)
Frontend: Enable All button enables all permissions in module
Frontend: Disable All button disables all permissions in module
Frontend: Checkbox toggling updates permission state
Frontend: Save Changes button persists to backend
Frontend: 'Role updated' toast message appears on save
Frontend: Permission changes persist after reopening dialog
critical_code_review_comments: PERMISSION_MODULES constant correctly defines all modules and their actions
togglePermission function correctly updates individual permission state
toggleModuleAll function correctly enables/disables all permissions in a module
Collapsible component from shadcn/ui used for expandable module sections
Backend RoleUpdate model accepts permissions as Dict[str, Dict[str, bool]]
System roles protected from name changes (is_system flag check)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing roles for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 Permission Matrix fix verified. IAM Roles tab shows 4 roles: Administrator, Privileged User, Standard User, Operator. Each role has edit button that opens dialog with Permission Matrix section. Matrix has 6 collapsible modules (Dashboard, Orders/Tickets, Users, Teams, Settings, Reports) with individual action checkboxes. Enable All/Disable All buttons work per module. Save persists to backend via PATCH /api/iam/roles/{id}. System roles (is_system=true) cannot have their name changed.

p0_permission_matrix_ui.description: Permission Matrix UI restored with collapsible modules, individual checkboxes, and Enable/Disable All buttons

roles_display.description: All 4 roles displayed: Administrator, Privileged User, Standard User, Operator

permission_modules.description: 6 modules: Dashboard (view), Orders/Tickets (7 actions), Users (4 actions), Teams (4 actions), Settings (2 actions), Reports (2 actions)

enable_disable_all.description: Enable All/Disable All buttons toggle all permissions in a module

save_persistence.description: Save Changes persists permissions to backend and shows success toast

backend_api.description: PATCH /api/iam/roles/{id} accepts permissions field and persists correctly
